name: Rich Egg Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the yeast, sugar, and salt to the dough setting.
2. Add the eggs and margarine, then begin mixing.
3. Gradually add the warm milk and flour, following the bread cycle instructions.
4. If the dough looks too wet or sticky during kneading, gradually add more flour (1 tablespoon at a time) until it reaches the desired consistency.
5. Use the white bread cycle setting on your machine.
6. For recipes calling for 2 loaves with 7-7 1/2 cups of flour, adjust all other ingredients accordingly.
7. If faced with an odd egg measurement, round up or down and adjust flour or liquid as needed.
8. Keep a record of measurements to refine the recipe in future attempts.
